summary: Project Header Inline Edit Feature - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 14/14 tests passed (3 rate-limited tests passed on retry). Planning and CRE roles can PATCH /api/projects/{project_id} with name, client_name, location, package_id fields. Project codes are in USB-H0001 format. Frontend: Edit pencil icon visible for planning/cre/super_admin roles, inline form shows 4 fields (Project Name, Client Name, Location, Package dropdown), Save/Cancel buttons work correctly, Package dropdown shows packages from GET /api/packages.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend PATCH /api/projects/{project_id} correctly allows CRE and Planning roles (line 1229)
Backend ProjectUpdate model includes package_id field (line 1224)
Backend generate_project_code() correctly generates USB-H0001 format (lines 63-80)
Frontend headerEditing state toggles between display and edit mode correctly
Frontend saveHeaderEdit() does optimistic UI update and shows success toast
Frontend Package dropdown fetches from GET /api/packages and shows '-- No Package --' option
context_for_next_testing_agent: Project header inline edit feature fully tested. Backend: PATCH /api/projects/{project_id} allows planning, cre, super_admin, project_manager roles. Accepts name, client_name, location, package_id fields. Frontend: Edit button (data-testid='header-edit-btn') visible for planning/cre/super_admin. Edit form fields: header-edit-name, header-edit-client, header-edit-location, header-edit-package. Save button: header-edit-save. Cancel button: header-edit-cancel. Project code displayed with data-testid='project-code' in USB-H format.

Backend Endpoints.PATCH /api/projects/{project_id} - Plann: PASS - Can update name, client_name, location, package_id
Backend Endpoints.PATCH /api/projects/{project_id} - Clear: PASS - Sending empty string clears package
Backend Endpoints.GET /api/projects/{project_id}/full-deta: PASS - Returns project_code in USB-H format
Backend Endpoints.GET /api/packages: PASS - Returns list of packages (1 package: Test DnD Package)

Frontend Features.Project Code Display: PASS - USB-H0006 displayed in header with data-testid='project-code'
Frontend Features.Package Dropdown Options: PASS - Shows '-- No Package --' and 'Test DnD Package'
Frontend Features.Save Button: PASS - (data-testid='header-edit-save') saves changes and shows toast
Frontend Features.Cancel Button: PASS - (data-testid='header-edit-cancel') closes edit mode without saving
Frontend Features.Toast Notification: PASS - 'Project details updated' toast appears after save
